description_long: This is a medium-sized, open-topped storage box with four flaps extending outward from the top edges, resembling a classic cardboard box design. The box is primarily brown with a slightly mottled, semi-glossy finish, and appears to be made of a sturdy, rigid material, possibly coated or treated for durability. The interior is hollow, providing ample space for storing or transporting items, and the flaps are flat and wide, suggesting they can be folded down to close the box. There are small, round fasteners or rivets visible on the exterior, likely reinforcing the structure at key points. One side of the box features faint, dark text or signage, possibly for labeling or branding purposes. The overall construction and appearance suggest it is suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, warehouses, or sidewalks.
description: A brown, open-topped storage box with four outward flaps, reinforced corners, and faint labeling on one side. The box has a semi-glossy, sturdy finish and is designed for practical urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open box with all four flaps extended outward and no visible labeling.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing faint dark text or signage on the front panel and the open flaps.
description_view_2: Rear view with the open box and flaps, no visible labeling, and a clear view of the box's depth.
description_view_3: Angled view similar to view 1, showing the faint text or signage and the open flaps.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: faint printed signage on one side
